title: Martin Cuilla
compiled_truth: Martin Cuilla is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-25), Martin Cuilla sent 209 and received 361 emails, totalling 570 interactions. Top correspondents: [Zwharton](people/zwharton-dawray) (34), [S  Shively](people/s-shively) (17), [Mcuilla](people/mcuilla-houston) (16), [Greg Martin](people/greg-martin) (15), [Gary Lamphier](people/gary-lamphier) (12).
